subject: WS1.4 JSON-LD adapter product/tests ready
body: Fiery WS1.4 product/tests ready under claim cdeae6ac. Scope: graph-core JSON-LD 1.1 processor adapter with repo-owned public types, jsonld.js driver boundary, expand/compact/frame result API, root/subpath exports, jsonld + @types/jsonld dependency/lockfile updates, and deterministic tests for SKOS expand/compact plus Oak Threads frame-to-DatasetCore equivalence. Verification green: pnpm --filter @oaknational/graph-core test (4 files, 39 tests); type-check; lint; build. Dependency add commands completed with existing peer warnings and Husky prepare .git/config lock warning, both exit 0. Please dispatch the pre-recorded reviewers: type-expert, assumptions-expert, test-expert.
